experiences.title: Software Developer
experiences.description: Engineered a suite of .NET applications to offload heavy stored procedure processing, ingest and parse unstructured log files into a centralized database, and provide a web-based interface for real-time system monitoring and troubleshooting.

experiences.title: .Net Developer
experiences.description: Designed and developed multiple web applications across Blazor Server, ASP.NET Core, and .NET technologies, implementing features such as AI-driven market analysis, SaaS modules, eCommerce enhancements, system integrations, and optimized APIs, while improving performance, automation, and real-time reporting across platforms.

experiences.title: .Net Developer GH
experiences.description: Developed a .NET console application for automated secure sFTP file transfers, built a data management web portal using ASP.NET Core MVC, and provided ongoing support and maintenance to ensure application stability and performance.

experiences.title: Web Developer Intern
experiences.description: Developed full-stack web applications including Learning Management, School Management, and PESO systems using ASP.NET Core Razor Pages, and built a video conferencing app with an interactive multi-user grid layout using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.name: Internet Management System
projects.description: An Internet Management System is a web-based platform designed for small to medium internet service providers to manage customers, applications, modem devices, and service statuses in a centralized and efficient way.

projects.name: Ajaa
projects.description: Ajaa is an all-in-one productivity platform that helps teams and individuals manage tasks, projects, invoicing, collaboration, and knowledge sharing across multiple businesses in one centralized system.

projects.name: Envy Wheels
projects.description: Envy Wheels is an eCommerce website that offers a wide selection of alloy and steel wheels, allowing customers to browse, search by vehicle fitment, and purchase products online.

projects.name: Investor Tracker
projects.description: Investor Tracker is an AI-powered platform that lets users track investors or companies, analyzes trusted web data to generate market insights and buy/sell recommendations, and sends email notifications for the latest updates and news.
